name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices
notes: This rule defines all endpoint protection devices on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Symantec System Center, McAfee ePolicy Orchestrator, Trend InterScan VirusWall, Trend Micro Office Scan, FireEye, VMware vShield, Microsoft Endpoint Protection, Trend Micro Deep Discovery Inspector, HBGary Active Defense, Kaspersky Security Center, ThreatGRID Malware Threat Intelligence Platform, IBM Security Trusteer Apex Advanced Malware Protection, Lastline Enterprise, Carbon Black, Trend Micro Deep Discovery Email Inspector, Cisco Firepower Management Center, CrowdStrike Falcon, Microsoft 365 Defender
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Symantec System Center, McAfee ePolicy Orchestrator, Trend InterScan VirusWall, Trend Micro Office Scan, FireEye, VMware vShield, Microsoft Endpoint Protection, Trend Micro Deep Discovery Inspector, HBGary Active Defense, Kaspersky Security Center, ThreatGRID Malware Threat Intelligence Platform, IBM Security Trusteer Apex Advanced Malware Protection, Lastline Enterprise, Carbon Black, Trend Micro Deep Discovery Email Inspector, Cisco Firepower Management Center, CrowdStrike Falcon, Microsoft 365 Defender
